sentences.arabic: فِي المَسَاءِ سَأَلَ الأَبُ وَلَدَهُ عَنْ يَوْمِهِ.
sentences.translation: Uveče je otac pitao sina o njegovom danu.
sentences.translationEn: In the evening the father asked his son about his day.

sentences.translation: Rekao mu je da je bio dobar dan.
sentences.translationEn: He told him it was a good day.

sentences.translation: Igrao se s prijateljima i dobro jeo.
sentences.translationEn: He played with his friends and ate well.

sentences.translation: Otac se nasmiješio i rekao «Hvala Bogu».
sentences.translationEn: The father smiled and said «Thank God».

sentences.arabic: تَمَنَّى لَهُ لَيْلَةً هَانِئَةً وَنَامَ الوَلَدُ.
sentences.translation: Poželio mu mirnu noć i dječak je zaspao.
sentences.translationEn: He wished him a peaceful night and the boy fell asleep.
